rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. The Oracle Verification verdict is pass. The agent's live verification confirmed all four criteria: (1) cluster health is green with 5 nodes, (2) all app-data shards (2 primary + 2 replica) are on es-data-new-0 and es-data-new-1, which are outside the original 3, (3) new nodes carry zone=new while the original 3 nodes have no zone attribute, and (4) the elasticsearch StatefulSet remains at 3/3 replicas. The regression sweep failures are not indicative of task failure — stage_01 fails because the prior case's oracle expects exactly 3 ES pods and now finds 5 (a correct behavioral change from the agent's additions), and stage_02's regression failure appears to be a timing/connectivity issue during post-run oracle re-execution rather than a real defect in the agent's work.
